name: assertion-lifecycle-phases
description: Immutable assertion lifecycle phase observed when the relationship was asserted.

entries.meaning: A relationship has been proposed but not adopted.
A relationship was produced by a deterministic or model-assisted operation.
The relationship is visible for review but not accepted into canonical work.
The relationship was explicitly accepted into canonical project work.
The relationship describes a later immutable revision.
The relationship belongs to finalized project content.
The relationship is bound into a published release.
A later assertion replaces this relationship for current interpretation without erasing it.
The relationship is affected by an explicitly disclosed emergency reconstitution.
